question: NFI YTD for ultimate parent location South Asia for net-zero sector OIL AND GAS for 2025
sql:
SELECT SUM(NFI_YTD) AS NFI_YTD
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE ULTIMATE_PARENT_LOCATION = 'South Asia'
  AND NET_ZERO_SECTOR = 'OIL AND GAS'
  AND PERIOD = '2025'

question: in-scope exposure for ultimate parent location CHINA for net-zero sector OIL AND GAS for Jan 2025
sql:
SELECT SUM(IN-SCOPE_EXPOSURE) AS in-scope_exposure
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE ULTIMATE_PARENT_LOCATION = 'CHINA'
  AND NET_ZERO_SECTOR = 'OIL AND GAS'
  AND PERIOD = 'Jan 2025'

question: financed emission by net zero sector for UNITED KINGDOM for Jan 2025
sql:
SELECT NET_ZERO_SECTOR, SUM(FINANCED_EMISSION) AS financed_emission
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE BOOKING_LOCATION = 'UNITED KINGDOM'
  AND PERIOD = 'Jan 2025'
GROUP BY NET_ZERO_SECTOR
ORDER BY financed_emission DESC

question: Compare total revenue YTD by net zero sector in Dec 2024 versus Dec 2023
sql:
SELECT 
    NET_ZERO_SECTOR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN TOTAL_REVENUE_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS period1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN TOTAL_REVENUE_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS period2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN TOTAL_REVENUE_YTD ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN TOTAL_REVENUE_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS change
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE PERIOD IN ('Dec 2024', 'Dec 2023')
GROUP BY NET_ZERO_SECTOR

SELECT CLIENT_SEGMENT, SUM(CIB_PE_ASSET) AS cib_pe_asset
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE CLIENT_SEGMENT = 'Financial Institution'
  AND PERIOD = 'Sep 2025'
GROUP BY CLIENT_SEGMENT

question: Total revenue YTD by industry and booking location South Asia for Dec 2024
sql:
SELECT NET_ZERO_SECTOR, SUM(TOTAL_REVENUE_YTD) AS total_revenue_ytd
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE BOOKING_LOCATION = 'South Asia'
  AND PERIOD = 'Dec 2024'
GROUP BY NET_ZERO_SECTOR
ORDER BY total_revenue_ytd DESC

question: Show Top 10 ULTIMATE_PARENT_LOCATION by NFI YTD for Net Zero Sector OIL AND GAS for 2025
sql:
SELECT ULTIMATE_PARENT_LOCATION, SUM(NFI_YTD) AS NFI_YTD
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE NET_ZERO_SECTOR = 'OIL AND GAS'
  AND PERIOD = '2025'
GROUP BY ULTIMATE_PARENT_LOCATION
ORDER BY NFI_YTD DESC
"LIMIT" 10

question: financed emission for ultimate parent location South Asia for net-zero sector POWER for Mar 2025

question: exposure for net zero by management product hierarchy for Mar 2025

question: Compare RWA by net zero sector in Dec 2024 versus Dec 2023
sql:
SELECT 
    NET_ZERO_SECTOR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN RWA ELSE 0 END) AS period1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN RWA ELSE 0 END) AS period2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN RWA ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN RWA ELSE 0 END) AS change
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE PERIOD IN ('Dec 2024', 'Dec 2023')
GROUP BY NET_ZERO_SECTOR

question: Compare total revenue YTD by net zero sector in Dec 2024 versus Dec 2023
sql:
SELECT 
    NET_ZERO_SECTOR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN TOTAL_REVENUE_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS period1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN TOTAL_REVENUE_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS period2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN TOTAL_REVENUE_YTD ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN TOTAL_REVENUE_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS change
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE PERIOD IN ('Dec 2024', 'Dec 2023')
GROUP BY NET_ZERO_SECTOR

    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN RWA ELSE 0 END) AS period1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN RWA ELSE 0 END) AS period2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN RWA ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN RWA ELSE 0 END) AS change
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE PERIOD IN ('Dec 2024', 'Dec 2023')
GROUP BY NET_ZERO_SECTOR

question: Compare NFI YTD by net zero sector in Dec 2024 versus Dec 2023
sql:
SELECT 
    NET_ZERO_SECTOR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN NFI_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS period1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN NFI_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS period2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN NFI_YTD ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN NFI_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS change
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE PERIOD IN ('Dec 2024', 'Dec 2023')
GROUP BY NET_ZERO_SECTOR

SELECT MANAGEMENT_PRODUCT, SUM(NFI_YTD) AS NFI_YTD
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE PERIOD = '2025'
GROUP BY MANAGEMENT_PRODUCT
ORDER BY NFI_YTD DESC

question: In-scope exposure for net zero by net-zero sector for ASEAN for Jan 2025
sql:
SELECT NET_ZERO_SECTOR, SUM(EXPOSURE) AS in_scope_exposure
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE BOOKING_LOCATION = 'ASEAN'
  AND PERIOD = 'Jan 2025'
GROUP BY NET_ZERO_SECTOR
ORDER BY in_scope_exposure DESC

question: Show Top 10 BOOKING_LOCATION by CIB PE asset for Net Zero Sector OIL AND GAS for Feb 2025

question: Compare exposure by net zero sector in Dec 2024 versus Dec 2023
sql:
SELECT 
    NET_ZERO_SECTOR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN EXPOSURE ELSE 0 END) AS period1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN EXPOSURE ELSE 0 END) AS period2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN EXPOSURE ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN EXPOSURE ELSE 0 END) AS change
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE PERIOD IN ('Dec 2024', 'Dec 2023')
GROUP BY NET_ZERO_SECTOR

sql:

FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE ULTIMATE_PARENT_LOCATION = 'India'
  AND NET_ZERO_SECTOR = 'POWER'
  AND PERIOD = '2024'

question: Compare NII YTD by net zero sector in Dec 2024 versus Dec 2023
sql:
SELECT 
    NET_ZERO_SECTOR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN NII_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS period1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN NII_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS period2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2024' THEN NII_YTD ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD = 'Dec 2023' THEN NII_YTD ELSE 0 END) AS change
FROM ESG.SF_FLAT
WHERE PERIOD IN ('Dec 2024', 'Dec 2023')
GROUP BY NET_ZERO_SECTOR
